prompt: Create a dramatic widescreen anime fantasy illustration of an elderly fire sorcerer standing in a dark smoky battlefield, viewed from a low cinematic angle. The sorcerer has very long flowing white hair and a long white beard, wears a heavy black robe with deep crimson-red highlights, and thrusts one open hand toward the viewer while the other hand is raised at the side as if controlling magic. A plain opaque brown square censor block covers the center of the face, hiding the eyes, nose, and mouth. On the right side of the image, create one huge swirling circular vortex of blazing orange and yellow fire, like a flaming portal or spell ring, with intense glowing edges and a bright center. Add one smaller curling flame plume on the left side behind the raised hand, plus scattered sparks and embers throughout the air. Use high-contrast lighting from the fire, warm orange rim light on the hair and robe, deep black-red shadows, dynamic wind-blown hair and fabric, sharp anime linework, painterly shading, epic dark fantasy mood, no text, no watermark, 16:9 composition.
